codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original hardening feature together with the follow-up fix. The original stale-id bulk query and syncMetadataPersistError surfacing remain intact, and commit c6074fa replaces the regressed latest-25-global-row scan with a safe two-step lookup scoped through the target player's own recent player_matches rows before bulk-fetching match_cache candidates. The updated tests cover both hostile input safety and the older cached-match recovery case that previously failed review, so the blocking stale-coverage regression is resolved without reopening the original PR-review concerns.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker used the web-feature-worker skill for a backend-only PR-review remediation fix. The skill is written around user-facing/browser verification and does not document a lighter-weight backend review/remediation path, so it remains an awkward fit for features like safe cache lookup hardening that only touch API/helper code.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature pr-review-safe-match-cache-lookup-fix lists skillName web-feature-worker in mission features.json, while commit c6074fa only edits lib/riot-api-service.ts and lib/riot-api-service.test.ts; the handoff's skillFeedback likewise suggests documenting an explicit no-browser path for backend-only PR review remediation features.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed scrutiny report, both feature handoffs/transcript skeletons, and commits 89b287c plus c6074fa. The fix now scopes cached summoner-id fallback candidates through player-specific player_matches rows, preserves the original query-hardening and sync-metadata improvements, and adds regression coverage for the older cached-match case that caused the earlier failure, so this follow-up passes review.
